name: Hudson Pacific Properties Inc. 4.750% Series C Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Hudson Pacific Properties Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that acquires, develops, and operates office and studio properties primarily in the West Coast of the United States. Headquartered in Los Angeles, California, the company focuses on providing space for technology and media tenants. The provided ticker represents a series C cumulative redeemable preferred stock.
